text:
(In reply to Niclas Zeising from comment #3)

Sure, here is the xorg config:

<---snip--->
Section "Device"
	Identifier 	"Card0"
	Driver		"intel"
	Option		"AccelMethod"	"uxa"
#	Option		"TearFree"	"true"
EndSection
<---snip--->

I'll attach the dmesg and Xorg.log file to the ticket.

Kind regards,

Jens
